svg.text: Multi-Party Federated Confidential Computing - Architecture Overview
4 Confidential Containers · AKS Virtual Nodes · Nginx Reverse Proxy (ports 80/8081/8082/8083)

g.text: Raw data never leaves partner TEEs

svg.text: * Partner access granted via explicit Key Vault policy
• All containers run identical code from the same image
• Only Confidential SKU containers have /dev/sev-guest device
• Federated: raw data stays local, only aggregate insights shared with Woodgrove
1. Each container passes TEE attestation (AMD SEV-SNP)
2. Each partner decrypts & analyzes own data locally
3. Raw data never leaves any partner's TEE boundary
4. Partners export only aggregate insights (counts, avgs)
6. Final federated report uses no individual records
